excluded: a claim that PhaseWrap-RoPE replaces RoPE
a claim that a one-block synthetic decoder gate is sufficient for promotion
supported: A no-credential matched one-block decoder-only transformer gate after the Stage 44 compact plateau.
Fair RoPE/ALiBI/sinusoidal/no-position/PhaseWrap comparisons under matched seeds, tasks, model shape, optimizer, epochs, and train-short/test-long splits.
Preservation of both positive and negative downstream evidence through aggregate metrics, per-seed rows, and failed-run artifacts.

gate_decision.claim_boundary: This matched one-block decoder-only gate does not promote PhaseWrap-RoPE beyond the bounded claim.

fair_comparison_controls: same model shape and trainable parameterization
model.trained_components: token embeddings, q/k/v projections, output projection, positional scale
